name: Pacific Ocean Adventure
description: How about fishing in the depths of the Pacific ocean? You must fight against sharks and hunt other fish to earn gold! Join this wonderful adventurous game now!
instructions: W A S D or Arrow Keys Movement Space Attack When you enter the game from a mobile device you can use the touch controls on the screen
tags: 1 Player, 2D, Action, Adventure, Bubble, Fish, Fishing, Pixel, survival
